scripts.package:verify: npm run pack:dir && npm run package:smoke
scripts.installer:verify: npm run dist:win && npm run installer:smoke
scripts.release:verify: npm run installer:smoke && npm run release:artifacts && npm run release:report && npm run website:release
scripts.release:build: npm run dist:win && npm run release:verify
scripts.check: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check src/renderer.js && node --check website/script.js && node --check scripts/integrity.js && node --check scripts/protect-template.js && node --check scripts/runtime-watchdog.js && node --check scripts/package-smoke-test.js && node --check scripts/installer-smoke-test.js && node --check scripts/generate-release-artifacts.js && node --check scripts/generate-release-report.js && node --check scripts/publish-website-release.js && node --check scripts/website-smoke-test.js && node --check scripts/website-release-publish-smoke-test.js && node --check scripts/production-check.js && node --check scripts/server-production-check.js && node --check scripts/server-smoke-test.js && node --check scripts/release-preflight.js && node --check scripts/generate-deployment-checklist.js && node --check scripts/migrate-state-to-sqlite.js && node --check scripts/generate-icon.js && node --check scripts/generate-server-secrets.js && node --check scripts/local-integration.js && node --check scripts/sign-update-manifest.js && node --check scripts/update-signing-smoke-test.js && node --check server/env.js && node --check server/state-store.js && node --check server/index.js && node --check server/admin-client.js && node --check server/create-activation-code.js && node --check server/self-test.js
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run production:check && npm run server:check && npm run server:test && npm run server:smoke && npm run update:smoke && npm run website:smoke && npm run website:release:smoke && npm run release:preflight && npm run integrity:verify
